context_text: <B> know even if it was my work and and ah and there's so there's there's jokes that that people can make that from depends on who it comes from like for instance i just went back to work in december after having a baby and i'm pumping milk at at { at } / <A> [ huh-oh ] / <B> work and my boss who i don't like who doesn't like me made a comment one day about they left the ah coffee creamer out and it had spoilt and she was like well you know if we need to get milk we know where to get it we can just go get some from kathy and depending on who said that i might have either think thought it was just kind of dumb but innocuous or i might have thought it was you know slightly funny { but } / <A> [ hm ] / <B> coming from my boss who i know doesn't like me very much and who i know was very unhappy with me even having a baby she told me i wasn't ah sufficiently dedicated to my job um that i knew coming from her that it was not meant very lighthearted at all and so { it i } / <A> [ uh-huh ] / <B> didn't i didn't feel like a joke to me / <A> yeah
